title: bouteloua distans
intro: Bouteloua distans, also known as Blue Grama Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Bouteloua distans can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions to utilize its medicinal properties.
